overview.Name: Camtek Ltd
overview.Description: Camtek Ltd., develops, manufactures and sells inspection and metrology equipment for advanced interconnect packaging, memory, complementary metal oxide semiconductor image sensors, microelectromechanical systems, radio frequency and other segments of the semiconductor industry. The company is headquartered in Migdal HaEmek, Israel.
overview.Address: RAMAT GAVRIEL INDUSTRIAL ZONE, MIGDAL HAEMEK, ISRAEL, 23150
